records.m_Talk_ENG:
Mm
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Mm
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Mm
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waking up in a bed again. Seems like a habit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waking up in a bed again. Seems like a habit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waking up in a bed again. Seems like a habit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't feel my legs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't feel my legs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't feel my legs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were hanging from a tree like laundry while you passed out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were hanging from a tree like laundry while you passed out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were hanging from a tree like laundry while you passed out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: While we were in the city, an unscheduled wave of Ink Rain hit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: While we were in the city, an unscheduled wave of Ink Rain hit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: While we were in the city, an unscheduled wave of Ink Rain hit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Counterside Effect cycle isn't absolute. It's only a reference point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Counterside Effect cycle isn't absolute. It's only a reference point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Counterside Effect cycle isn't absolute. It's only a reference point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Andy said she found signs that the device had been activated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Andy said she found signs that the device had been activated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Andy said she found signs that the device had been activated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you jump in without knowing how dangerous it was?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you jump in without knowing how dangerous it was?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you jump in without knowing how dangerous it was?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>PTP</color> is a volatile energy. There's no way to store it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>PTP</color> is a volatile energy. There's no way to store it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>PTP</color> is a volatile energy. There's no way to store it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I missed this opportunity, I wouldn't know when it might run again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I missed this opportunity, I wouldn't know when it might run again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I missed this opportunity, I wouldn't know when it might run again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? Did you go back to the past? What did you see, and who did you meet this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? Did you go back to the past? What did you see, and who did you meet this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? Did you go back to the past? What did you see, and who did you meet this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll be a long story if I explain everything. Is that all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll be a long story if I explain everything. Is that all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll be a long story if I explain everything. Is that all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead. I brought plenty of peanuts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead. I brought plenty of peanuts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead. I brought plenty of peanuts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did she beat you up again this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did she beat you up again this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did she beat you up again this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you lost?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you lost?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you lost?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as you can see, here I am again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And as you can see, here I am again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And as you can see, here I am again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think some things just can't be explained with science.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think some things just can't be explained with science.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think some things just can't be explained with science.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was using something you built?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was using something you built?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was using something you built?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? How many more times are you planning to try?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? How many more times are you planning to try?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? How many more times are you planning to try?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Master
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Master
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Master
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then maybe I can help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then maybe I can help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then maybe I can help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You? Help Master? How?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You? Help Master? How?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You? Help Master? How?

records.m_Talk_ENG: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.
records.m_Talk_DEU: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.
records.m_Talk_FRA: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the right instructor, he can do better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the right instructor, he can do better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the right instructor, he can do better.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never taught anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never taught anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never taught anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I won't force you if you don't want it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I won't force you if you don't want it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I won't force you if you don't want it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please instruct me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please instruct me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please instruct me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No contact?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No contact?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No contact?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's been four days now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's been four days now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's been four days now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmm
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hmm
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hmm
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has something changed her mind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has something changed her mind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has something changed her mind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People always use each other to get what they need.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People always use each other to get what they need.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People always use each other to get what they need.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And we're using her too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And we're using her too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And we're using her too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you command.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vMiss Felix.


8vMiss Felix.


8vMiss Felix.

8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you saw that Yeonhwa lady again, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did she beat you up again this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did she beat you up again this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did she beat you up again this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least this time it was a duel, not an ambush.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told her I came to help, and she drew her sword to see if I had what it takes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you lost?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you lost?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you lost?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I trained enough, but I couldn't hold out for long.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And as you can see, here I am again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And as you can see, here I am again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And as you can see, here I am again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't get her. Why push away someone who came to help?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's your old comrade, isn't she? Why is she still like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe because sloppy help in the field can be more of a hindrance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If someone strong enough to overwhelm Seosaeng still didn't survive, then her judgment isn't wrong.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't argue. If I were stronger than her, it might have turned out differently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is she really someone you'd go back in time to save?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Yeonhwa was a comrade through life and death
8v maybe more than that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she kept appearing in my dreams even after I erased my memories, it must mean she mattered that much.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So you're saying all of this started because some woman in a dream asked you to find her
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to believe that came from the mouth of a genius scientist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think some things just can't be explained with science.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think some things just can't be explained with science.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think some things just can't be explained with science.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you've confirmed twice now that she's real. You even learned her name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess even scientists don't always talk logically.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So what's next? Planning to go back and duel her again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Convincing her by winning won't be easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even collecting clues about my lost memories is reason enough to return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you tried meeting the past version of yourself?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: No one hates themselves, right? If you ask questions, he'd probably cooperate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think so too. Talking to the version of me before the memory loss would be a big help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach a fixed location in the past. It's not easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Last time, all we got was one-way comms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's probably somewhere hard to reach.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, I did confirm something. The past me built a device similar to the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeonhwa was using that device to chase the Tiger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was using something you built?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was using something you built?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was using something you built?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So to stop the monster, you have to go back in time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The disaster we now call Ink Rain is caused by the blood of the Tiger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the power in Ink Rain opens paths to the past, then the owner of that blood might as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
A C.O. with time travel powers
8v no wonder the Administration couldn't catch it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you thought of making a device using its blood? That's not exactly normal either.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If past Master made the same device
8v maybe it's more like a gateway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's no coincidence you met Yeonhwa twice in the same place and time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> you built was a passage connecting to the one you built in the past!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> can only reach locations where the <color=#ffd34c>DTP</color> exists
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a shame. If only we could set the destination freely, it'd be far more useful.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I can't promise success
8v but I'll try to improve it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there really something even Seosaeng can't guarantee?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even someone like me got cut down twice because I couldn't change one woman's mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I could try a hundred more times and maybe succeed. But chances don't wait forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? How many more times are you planning to try?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? How many more times are you planning to try?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? How many more times are you planning to try?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
One year ago in Chamber
8v the only comrade who understood me was devoured by the Ink Rain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I learned that the cause of it all lay in my past, I realized I could never escape its shadow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And soon, something worse than the Ink Rain will arrive.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
To stop it
8v I have to go back to the past and save Yeonhwa.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
No matter
8v how many times it takes.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Master
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Master
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Master
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If the first step to changing the past is winning that duel with her
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then maybe I can help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then maybe I can help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then maybe I can help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You? Help Master? How?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You? Help Master? How?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You? Help Master? How?

root.m_Talk_ENG: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.
root.m_Talk_DEU: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.
root.m_Talk_FRA: His sword skills aren't great, but he's not untalented.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the right instructor, he can do better.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the right instructor, he can do better.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the right instructor, he can do better.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I mean
8v I admit you're strong, granny. But teaching is different, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never taught anyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never taught anyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never taught anyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I won't force you if you don't want it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I won't force you if you don't want it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I won't force you if you don't want it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please instruct me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please instruct me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please instruct me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Better than sitting around waiting for the next Ink Rain to fall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No contact?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No contact?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No contact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's been four days now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's been four days now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's been four days now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't sound like a problem. That woman always did go rogue, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agents tried to track her three hours ago but failed. She seems to have destroyed her tracking chip.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Hmm
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Hmm
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Hmm
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Has something changed her mind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Has something changed her mind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Has something changed her mind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe she only ever intended to use our intel in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: People always use each other to get what they need.
root.m_Talk_DEU: People always use each other to get what they need.
root.m_Talk_FRA: People always use each other to get what they need.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And we're using her too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And we're using her too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And we're using her too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Allowing rule-breakers to walk free sets a bad example.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must show the loyal Brothers what happens in such a case.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It won't be easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It won't be easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But if you insist
8v Let's make an example of her, and eliminate the target while you're at it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you command.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you command.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you command.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vMiss Felix.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vMiss Felix.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vMiss Felix.
